query:
SELECT 
  rp.id,
  rp.name,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay,
  fi.name AS feedItem,
  fi.unit,
  ac.name AS category,
  rp.speciesId,
  rp.categoryId,
  rp.isActive
FROM ration_plans rp
LEFT JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
LEFT JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = rp.categoryId
ORDER BY rp.id;
